chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc: Application No.S-350 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on o/objection 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of Cr. M.A No.3046/25 (S/A). 21.07.2025 Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General...-..-...-..-..-..-..-..- None for the applicant is present. Learned DPG has invited my attention to the report of SHO P.S Tharushah same is placed on record. It is apparent from the perusal of said report that FIR No.93/2025 has already been registered in compliance of the impugned order. In that respect instant Crl. Misc: application has become infructuous, same is hereby dismissed accordingly. JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
